## world-place вЂ” declare the place a game happens in вЂ” flat/round/voxel/board ground, surface laws, per-place physics

- `world` (function) В· `import { world } from "@jgengine/core/world"`

## world-seed вЂ” derive a deterministic generator/scatter seed from world id + save/run seed

- `seedForPlace` (function) В· `import { seedForPlace } from "@jgengine/core/world"`
